title: Color Management Resource Descriptor (0x91)
description: Color Management triplet layout. (Do not include triplet length or TID here.)

enumMap.01: Process the CMR as an audit CMR
enumMap.02: Process the CMR as an instruction CMR
enumMap.03: Process the CMR as a link CMR (valid only for Link DL CMRs)

enumMap.01: Scope of CMR is a data object
enumMap.02: Scope of CMR is a page or overlay
enumMap.03: Scope of CMR is a document
enumMap.04: Scope of CMR is a print file
enumMap.05: Scope of CMR is a page/sheet group
